name: smartwriter-mcp-chrome
description: Smartwriter MCP Chrome Extension - Bridge between MCP server and Chrome for DOM automation

scripts.build: tsup src/background.ts src/content.ts src/popup.ts --format iife --splitting false --target es2022 --outDir dist --minify && mv dist/background.global.js dist/background.js && mv dist/content.global.js dist/content.js && mv dist/popup.global.js dist/popup.js && cp src/popup.html dist/popup.html && cp manifest.json dist/manifest.json
scripts.build:dev: tsup src/background.ts src/content.ts src/popup.ts --format iife --splitting false --target es2022 --outDir dist --sourcemap && mv dist/background.global.js dist/background.js && mv dist/content.global.js dist/content.js && mv dist/popup.global.js dist/popup.js && cp src/popup.html dist/popup.html && cp manifest.json dist/manifest.json
scripts.watch: tsup src/background.ts src/content.ts src/popup.ts --format iife --splitting false --target es2022 --outDir dist --watch --sourcemap && mv dist/background.global.js dist/background.js && mv dist/content.global.js dist/content.js && mv dist/popup.global.js dist/popup.js && cp src/popup.html dist/popup.html && cp manifest.json dist/manifest.json
